div.div:
Unity Catalog Governance — cross-cutting (Bronze → ML)
Single catalog state_fund_poc · column masks (SSN / DOB) · region row filter · data lineage · audit via system tables · Delta time travel
All pipelines are serverless Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines (SQL). Source data is fully synthetic.
